| `and` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \text{ and } rs2$ | and | R |
| `or` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \text{ or } rs2$ | or | R |
| `xor` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \text{ xor } rs2$ | exclusive or | R |
| `andi` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd = rs1 \text{ and } ZeroExt(imm12)$ | and immediate | I |
| `ori` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd = rs1 \text{ or } ZeroExt(imm12)$ | or immediate | I |
| `xori` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd = rs1 \text{ xor } ZeroExt(imm12)$ | exclusive or immediate | I |
